componentDescription: Displays various types of messages to users with customizable content, actions, and automatic dismissal.

subtitle.description: The secondary text content displayed below the title.

variant.description: The type of message, dictating its visual style and associated icon.

hide.description: A callback function to trigger the dismissal or hiding of the message.

title.description: The main title or heading of the message.

theme.description: Custom theme styles to override the default appearance for different message variants.

isClosable.description: Determines if a close button is shown, allowing the user to manually dismiss the message.

views.description: An object containing custom styling properties for various parts of the message component.

action.description: A callback function to be executed when the message's action button is clicked.

actionText.description: The text label displayed on the interactive action button.

showIcon.description: Controls the visibility of the predefined icon associated with the message variant.

timeout.description: The duration in milliseconds after which the message automatically hides itself (if not closable).
